missions.title: Mastery Module 1: Reflection of light and Related Concepts
missions.description: Comprehensive analysis covering reflection of light, spherical mirrors, mirror formula and advanced applications.

microtargets.title: Reflection of light
ncertAnchors: NCERT Physics Class 12, Chapter: Optics, Section detailing Reflection of light
mustKnowFacts: A thorough understanding of Reflection of light is frequently appears in NEET examinations.
Applying the core principles of Reflection of light correctly is essential for solving integrated numerical and conceptual problems in Optics.
commonTraps: Misinterpreting the advanced application scenarios of Reflection of light during high-pressure exam scenarios.
Failing to recall the exact conditions or sign conventions associated with Reflection of light.
masteryCriteria: Understands and can apply concepts of Reflection of light.
Successfully avoids common pitfalls when Reflection of light is integrated with other concepts in Optics.
pyqPatterns: NEET PyQs emphasize the application of Reflection of light in tricky assertion-reason or statement-based questions.

activeRecallQuestions.question: Explain an application where using the concept of Reflection of light can lead to a common student error.
